response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial initiative, his background lacks the deep, recognized artificial intelligence expertise and strategic, director-level leadership required for this Principal Engineer role. His recent exposure to AI tooling is promising, but his overall profile aligns more closely with a hands-on generalist Staff Engineer rather than an AI Strategy Director expected to advise enterprise customers and drive cloud AI differentiation.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience across diverse tech stacks.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit and builder fluency through founding open-source platforms and leading side projects.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks deep, recognized expertise in AI and ML, as well as the preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field.
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership or experience advising enterprise customers on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption.
The vast majority of his career focuses on general full-stack web development, GIS, and testing frameworks rather than AI-powered product strategy.
